flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Eastern Iowa Community College District are 7% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($39.1k vs $42.0k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Eastern Iowa Community College District rose 27% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.0k → $12.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Eastern Iowa Community College District rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.3k → $4.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Eastern Iowa Community College District fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.1% → 0.0%).
